word: G1794 - ἐντυλίσσω - entylíssō - en-too-lis'-so - Wrap in

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐντυλίσσω

- Transliteration: Entulisso

- Phonetic: en-too-lis'-so

- Definition:

1. to roll up, wrap together

- Origin: from G1722 and tulisso (to twist, probably akin to G1507)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1722 and τυλίσσω tulissō (to twist; probably akin to G1507); to entwine that is wind up in: - wrap in (together).
